ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.academic_performance (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), student_id uuid, subject text NOT NULL, term text NOT NULL, session text NOT NULL, score numeric DEFAULT 0, grade text, remark text, ca_score numeric DEFAULT 0, exam_score numeric DEFAULT 0, last_updated timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(), school_id uuid);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.academic_terms (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, name text NOT NULL, term_type text, academic_year text NOT NULL, start_date date NOT NULL, end_date date NOT NULL, is_current boolean DEFAULT false, created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.academic_tracks (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), student_id uuid, curriculum_id uuid, status text DEFAULT 'Active'::text, enrolled_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.academic_years (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, name text NOT NULL, starts_on date NOT NULL, ends_on date NOT NULL, is_current boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.achievements (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, name text NOT NULL, description text, category text, icon_url text, points integer DEFAULT 10, criteria jsonb, is_active boolean DEFAULT true, created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.activity_logs (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid NOT NULL, action text NOT NULL, detail text NOT NULL, category text NOT NULL, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.announcements (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, title text NOT NULL, content text NOT NULL, target_audience text, created_by uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.anonymous_reports (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid, branch_id uuid, title text, content text NOT NULL, category text, status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'::text, reviewed_by uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.appointments (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, student_user_id uuid NOT NULL, requested_by_parent_id uuid NOT NULL, staff_user_id uuid NOT NULL, staff_type text NOT NULL, starts_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL, ends_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL, reason text NOT NULL DEFAULT ''::text, status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'requested'::text, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), branch_id uuid);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.assessment_components (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, component_key text NOT NULL, name text NOT NULL, is_active boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.assessment_weight_sets (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, name text NOT NULL, is_default boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, created_by uuid, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.assessment_weights (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, weight_set_id uuid NOT NULL, academic_year_id uuid, term_id uuid, class_section_id uuid, subject_id uuid, component_key text NOT NULL, weight_percent numeric NOT NULL, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.assessments (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, term_id uuid, class_id uuid, subject_id uuid, name text NOT NULL, max_score numeric DEFAULT 100, weight numeric DEFAULT 1.0, due_date date, created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.assignment_attachments (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), assignment_id uuid, submission_id uuid, file_name text NOT NULL, file_url text NOT NULL, file_type text, file_size bigint, uploaded_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.assignment_submissions (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, assignment_id uuid NOT NULL, student_user_id uuid NOT NULL, submission_text text NOT NULL DEFAULT ''::text, attachment_url text, submitted_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), graded_by uuid, grade_note text, student_id uuid, graded_at timestamp with time zone, score numeric, feedback text, status text DEFAULT 'submitted'::text);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.attendance_records (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, attendance_session_id uuid NOT NULL, student_user_id uuid NOT NULL, status text NOT NULL, note text, marked_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(), branch_id uuid);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.attendance_sessions (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, academic_year_id uuid NOT NULL, term_id uuid NOT NULL, class_section_id uuid NOT NULL, session_date date NOT NULL, taken_by uuid NOT NULL, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.audit_logs (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid, actor_user_id uuid, action text NOT NULL, entity_type text NOT NULL, entity_id uuid, metadata jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), user_id uuid, ip_address inet, updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(), branch_id uuid);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.auth_accounts (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), user_id uuid, school_id uuid, username text NOT NULL, email text NOT NULL, is_verified boolean DEFAULT false, created_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now()));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.behavior_notes (id uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), school_id uuid NOT NULL, student_id uuid NOT NULL, teacher_name text, type text, title text, note text NOT NULL, date timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(), created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(), branch_id uuid);
